metodos.codigoOriginal:
LPARAMETERS ldData, lnDia

LOCAL ldDataRet

ldDataRet = ldData
If( DOW(ldDataRet) <> lnDia )
	IF DOW(ldData) < lnDia
		DO WHILE DOW(ldDataRet) < lnDia
			ldDataRet = ldDataRet + 1
		EndDo		
	ELSE
		DO WHILE DOW(ldDataRet) > lnDia
			ldDataRet = ldDataRet - 1
		EndDo			
	Endif
ENDIF
Return(ldDataRet)

If (ThisForm.Check1.Value = 0)
	If( ThisForm.Opt_tipo.Value = 2 or ThisForm.Opt_tipo.Value = 3 )
		Report Form SigReFf1 Preview NoConsole
	Else	
		Report Form SigReFf2 Preview NoConsole
	Endif		
Else
	Report Form SigReFf3 Preview NoConsole
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Local lcEscape,ImpEmps

m.lcEscape = Set('Escape')

Set Escape off

ThisForm.LockScreen = .t.

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	* Apanhando as Operaçőes de Título Para Mostrar na Grade
	ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigOpOpe', 'TmpSigOpOpe', .f., .f., 'Dopes, Opers, RealPrevs, OpeCancs')

	Select .f. as SeleOp, Dopes, RealPrevs, Opers ;
	  From TmpSigOpOpe ;
	 Where fAcessoTitulo(Usuar, Dopes, '', ThisForm.poDataMgr) And OpeCancs <> 1 ;
	 Order By Dopes... [TRUNCADO]

If (ThisForm.Check1.Value = 0)
	If( ThisForm.Opt_tipo.Value = 2 or ThisForm.Opt_tipo.Value = 3 )
		Report Form SigReFf1 To Printer Prompt NoConsole
	Else	
		Report Form SigReFf2 To Printer Prompt NoConsole
	Endif		
Else
	Report Form SigReFf3 To Printer Prompt NoConsole
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If (ThisForm.Check1.Value = 0)
	If( ThisForm.Opt_tipo.Value = 2 or ThisForm.Opt_tipo.Value = 3 )
		Report Form SigReFf1 To Printer NoConsole

		Report Form SigReFf2 To Printer NoConsole
	Endif		
Else
	Report Form SigReFf3 To Printer NoConsole
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Update crSigOpOpe Set SeleOp = .f.
Go Top In crSigOpOpe
ThisForm.Grid1.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Update crSigOpOpe Set SeleOp = .t.
Go Top In crSigOpOpe
ThisForm.Grid1.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Lparameters nButton, nShift, nXCoord, nYCoord

Local SeleOp
ThisForm.LockScreen = .t.
m.SeleOp = (Not crSigOpOpe.SeleOp)
Select crSigOpOpe
Gather Memvar Fields SeleOp
This.Parent.Parent.Refresh
ThisForm.LockScreen = .f.
NoDefault
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Lparameters nKeyCode, nShiftAltCtrl

Local SeleOp
If InList(m.nKeyCode,13,32)
	ThisForm.LockScreen = .t.
	m.SeleOp = (Not crSigOpOpe.SeleOp)
	Select crSigOpOpe
	Gather Memvar Fields seleop
	This.Parent.Parent.Refresh
	ThisForm.LockScreen = .f.
	NoDefault
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
NoDefault
Return .f.

Lparameters nButton, nShift, nXCoord, nYCoord

Local ImpEmps

Gather Memvar Fields ImpEmps

Gather Memvar Fields ImpDisps

Return(Empty(ThisForm.get_cd_moedl.Value))

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdMoe', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'DMoes', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro

	Thisform.get_Cd_Moedl.Value = Evaluate('crListaRemota.Cmoes')

	loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdMoe', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'CMoes', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('CMoes', '', 'Código')

	This.Parent.get_Ds_Moeda.Value = crListaRemota.Dmoes

Else
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Moeda.Value... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

Else

ThisForm.get_vl_cotacao.Value = lnVlCotacao

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select .f. as SeleOp, Dopes, RealPrevs, Opers ; 	  From TmpSigOpOpe ; 	 Where fAcessoTitulo(Usuar, Dopes, '', ThisForm.poDataMgr) And OpeCancs <> 1 ; 	 Order By Dopes... [TRUNCADO]

SELECT ' ' as Titulo, dData1 as Coluna1, dData2 as Coluna2, dData3 as Coluna3, dData4 as Coluna4,; 		   dData5 as Coluna5, dData6 as Coluna6, dData7 as Coluna7, dData8 as Coluna8 ; 		   FROM crRel ; 	UNION ALL ; 	SELECT 'Saldo no início da '+Tipo as Titulo, STR(nSaldoIni1,12,2) as Coluna1, STR(nSaldoIni2,12,2) as Coluna2, STR(nSaldoIni3,12,2) as Coluna3, STR(nSaldoIni4,12,2) as Coluna4,; 		   STR(nSaldoIni5,12,2) as Coluna5, STR(... [TRUNCADO]
